case_title: HOCHING TSAI VS. SANDRA SHEUELAN MYINT

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION RE REQUEST TO APPEAR AT HEARING BY TELEPHONE. FILED BY DEFENDANT MYINT, SANDRA SHEUELAN
ORDER RE REQUEST TO APPEAR BY TELEPHONE. THE REQUEST IS GRANTED.
AUTO ACCIDENT CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $10,000.00 FILED BY TSAI, HOCHING AS TO DEFENDANT MYINT, SANDRA SHEUELAN ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR SEP-18-2020 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF - SIGNED SERVED JUN-17-2020, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT MYINT, SANDRA SHEUELAN
REQUEST TO APPEAR AT HEARING BY TELEPHONE FILED BY DEFENDANT MYINT, SANDRA SHEUELAN
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF SEP-18-2020 - JUDGMENT.
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, AS TO DEFENDANT MYINT, SANDRA SHEUELAN

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF TSAI, HOCHING RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT MYINT, SANDRA SHEUELAN $1,350.00 PRINCIPAL, $90.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,440.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF TSAI, HOCHING AS TO DEFENDANT MYINT, SANDRA SHEUELAN

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF SEP-18-2020 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF SEP-18-2020 BY PANG LY. PLAINTIFF HOCHING TSAI IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT SANDRA SHEUELAN MYINT, ASSISTED BY DAUGHTER (NO NAME PROVIDED) FOR BURMESE INTERPRETATION PRESENT BY COURTCALL. INTERPRETERS OATH IS PROVIDED. COURT EXAMINES/QUESTIONS DEFENDANT ON COURTCALL. PLAINTIFF EXHIBITS REVIEWED AND RETURNED. DEFENDANT EXHIBITS SUBMITTED TO COURT PRIOR TO TODAYS HEARING ARE REVIEWED. COMMISSIONER PANG LY; CLERK: W. TRUPEK. NOT REPORTED.(506)
